value.reason: The page documents model selection within the context of Codex's custom subagent configuration (the optional `model` field in TOML agent files), not a general SDK-level "Per-Agent Model Selection" feature for building agents in a workflow. The cell label implies a generic Agents SDK construct (referencing "GPT-4o, o3-mini" and "SDK auto-select"), but the page is specifically about Codex CLI/app subagent workflows and TOML-based custom agent files — a distinct product surface. The description's claims about "SDK auto-select" and pinning a model "at creation time" in a multi-agent workflow SDK are not supported by the page, which only mentions `model` as an optional field in a Codex TOML agent file that "inherits from the parent session when omitted." The label "Per-Agent Model Selection" is also not a term used on this page.
